title: AIHawk Queue
description: Handoff format between career-ops (stage 1: evaluate) and AIHawk (stage 2: apply). Produced by export-aihawk.mjs, consumed by bridge.py.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Increment when breaking changes are made.

exported_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this queue was generated.

score_threshold.description: Minimum score used to filter jobs into this queue.

status_filter.description: career-ops statuses that were included in the filter.

career_ops_dir.description: Absolute path to the career-ops repo on disk. Used by bridge.py to locate PDFs and reports.

jobs.description: Approved jobs ready for AIHawk submission.

id.description: Zero-padded 3-digit sequential ID from career-ops tracker.

company.description: Company name as it appears in career-ops tracker.

status.description: career-ops canonical status at export time.

hasPdf.description: Whether a tailored PDF resume was generated by career-ops.

pdfPath.description: Absolute path to the tailored PDF resume on disk. null if not found.

reportPath.description: Absolute path to the career-ops evaluation report (.md). null if not found.

jobUrl.description: Direct URL to the job posting. Extracted from the **URL:** field in the report. null if not found.

notes.description: One-line notes from the career-ops tracker.
